title: Community Gardens
description: For questions 1–8, read the text below and choose which answer (A, B, C or D) best completes each gap.

content.text:
Community gardens have become increasingly popular in urban areas as people seek ways to reconnect (0). nature. These shared green spaces allow city residents to grow their own vegetables and flowers, even when they lack private gardens. The benefits extend far (1). simply producing fresh food.

Research has shown that gardening can have a positive (2). on mental health, reducing stress and anxiety. Working outdoors and watching plants grow (3). a sense of achievement and purpose. Community gardens also help people (4). friendships with their neighbours, strengthening social bonds in areas where residents might otherwise remain strangers.

Many cities have (5). up programmes to convert vacant lots into productive garden spaces. These initiatives often (6). from grants and donations, though some charge small membership fees. Experienced gardeners typically volunteer to (7). advice to newcomers, creating a supportive learning environment. As concerns about food security and environmental sustainability continue to grow, community gardens are likely to (8). an even more important role in urban life.

example.explanation: 'Reconnect with' es la expresión correcta para volver a conectar con algo.

questions.explanation: 'Far beyond' significa mucho más allá de algo.
'Have a positive effect on' es la colocación correcta para tener un efecto positivo.
'Bring a sense of' es la colocación correcta para proporcionar una sensación.
'Form friendships' es la colocación correcta para establecer amistades.
'Set up' es el phrasal verb correcto para establecer o crear programas.
'Give advice' es la colocación correcta para dar consejos.
'Play a role' es la expresión fija para desempeñar un papel.
